title: Rain & Stain Barrier Spray 200 ml
features: DEFENSIVE PROTECTION FOR TRAINERS!: Urban Kicks Trainers Rain & Stain Barrier Spray, suitable for fabric trainers and leather footwear. It is an effective waterproofing barrier spray, ensuring excellent protection for your kicks from rain and stains. A new product from the team @WeAreUrbanKicks
OUT OF BOX FOOTWEAR: Urban Kicks Rain & Stain Barrier Spray, easy to apply, quick drying, repels liquid and protects from staining. The spray will not affect the look or feel of trainers
KICKS IN TIP TOP CONDITION!: Use Urban Kicks Rain & Stain Barrier Spray with Urban Kicks Wipes and Trainer Erasers to keep your kicks into tip top condition ready to get out and impress

EASY TO USE: Footwear to be treated must be clean, dry and free from detergents before applying the spray. Shake the can well, remove cap, from a distance of 15cm from the footwear, spray evenly across footwear surface. Allow footwear to dry completely before wearing. Do not allow water contact with the footwear before the barrier spray has completely dried
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Urban Kicks 200ml Rain & Stain Barrier Spray. Ideal for fabric trainers and leather footwear
description: Product Description Urban Kicks Trainers Rain & Stain Barrier Spray, suitable for fabric trainers and leather footwear. Urban Kicks 200ml Rain & Stain Barrier Spray. Ideal for fabric trainers and leather footwear Ingredients HEPTANE, PROPAN-2-OL, N-BUTYL ACETATE
